FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fcc9cc6f600>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-13T15:26:26Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-13T15:24:42Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-13T15:26:26Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-13T15:24:42Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/13 15:28:05.803781803 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",

2026/05/13 15:28:05.803856352 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/13 15:28:05.803877211 {

2026/05/13 15:28:05.804041208 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804061196 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804061977 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804075613 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804076534 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804090090 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804090932 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804106651 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804109226 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804122120 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804123112 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804137308 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804138120 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804168437 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804179708 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804180710 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804195848 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/05/13 15:28:05.804210916 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804211587 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804229862 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804230753 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804244840 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804245952 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804266310 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804267171 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804281859 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804284213 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804354365 "default"))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804356258 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804372529 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804373330 }
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804459361 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804461175 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804482104 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804482975 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/13 15:28:05.804499917 }
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804558948 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804560561 }

2026/05/13 15:28:05.804605365 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804624040 domain = NA)

2026/05/13 15:28:05.804642254 }
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804643115 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804659526 old$family <- family
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804660358 }

2026/05/13 15:28:05.804768330 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/05/13 15:28:05.804796673 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804797965 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,

2026/05/13 15:28:05.803781803 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803789417 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803856352 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803857504 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803877211 {
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803878474 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803891278 new <- list()
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803892380 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803917066 new$width <- width
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803917908 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803931393 new$height <- height
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803932244 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803945860 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803946691 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803960407 new$title <- title
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803961138 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803974483 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/13 15:28:05.803975265 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804039415 new$version <- version
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804041208 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804061196 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804061977 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804075613 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804076534 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804090090 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804090932 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804106651 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804109226 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804122120 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804123112 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804137308 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804138120 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804168437 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804179708 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804180710 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804195848 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804196670 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804210916 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804211587 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804229862 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804230753 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804244840 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804245952 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804266310 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804267171 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804281859 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804284213 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804354365 "default"))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804356258 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804372529 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804373330 }
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804459361 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804461175 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804482104 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804482975 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804499005 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804499917 }
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804558948 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804560561 }
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804579166 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804580107 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804604393 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804605365 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804624040 domain = NA)
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804625052 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804642254 }
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804643115 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804659526 old$family <- family
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804660358 }
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804675185 version <- old$version
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804676117 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804694281 "2.0")

2026/05/13 15:28:05.804710552 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804711383 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804731892 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804732813 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804749284 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804750136 domain = NA)
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804768330 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804769222 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804796673 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804797965 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804822361 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804823293 invisible()
2026/05/13 15:28:05.804844189 }
